narrative:
Englewood City has 9,422 registered voters, with 54.0% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 22.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 23.3%, a narrow Democratic lean of 0.6 percentage points.
